name: Composed: sub-research → critique
description: Demonstrates a sub-workflow node: it runs the entire research-default workflow as one composable step, then has the critic review that report and the synthesizer fold the review back into a final write-up. Shows how a whole workflow can be reused as a building block inside a larger pipeline.

nodes.instruction: Read the sub-workflow report in notes/research.md and write a critical review to notes/critique.md: note gaps, weak claims, and anything to verify.
